MINI MINUTES: JPT Michael Lee; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Bay Property Group is present. Represented by Daniel Bornstein.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendants Michael Barrett and Timothy Green are present.
Attorney Dmitri Pikman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUN-30-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
